swills      2011-04-10 16:11:49 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    sysutils/puppet      Makefile distinfo 
    sysutils/puppet/files optpatch-package_origin

    sysutils/puppet/files patch-fix_password_provider 
  Log:
  - Update to 2.6.7
  - Updates optional patch to use improved package provider
  - Adds patch to fix user/password provider hash usage
  
  PR:             ports/156239
  Submitted by:   Russell Jackson <raj at csub.edu> (maintainer)
